title: Projects
text:
This page highlights selected remote sensing, spatial analysis, and GIS projects developed during my Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management at the University of British Columbia.





Harmonized land-cover analysis of agricultural transitions in the Lower Fraser Valley, British Columbia.





Forest structure analysis using LiDAR point clouds, canopy height models, and individual tree detection workflows.





Spectral interpretation of vegetation and non-vegetation classes using reflectance curves and hyperspectral remote sensing workflows.

title: Projects
text:
This page highlights selected remote sensing, spatial analysis, and GIS projects developed during my Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management at the University of British Columbia.





Harmonized land-cover analysis of agricultural transitions in the Lower Fraser Valley, British Columbia.





Forest structure analysis using LiDAR point clouds, canopy height models, and individual tree detection workflows.





Spectral interpretation of vegetation and non-vegetation classes using reflectance curves and hyperspectral remote sensing workflows.

title: About
text:
I am passionate about advancing work in spatial ecology and environmental management. My goal is to contribute to global conservation efforts through the integration of traditional monitoring approaches with modern technologies in remote sensing and Geographic Information Systems.
My interests include spatial ecology, land-cover analysis, environmental monitoring, GIS, and geospatial data communication using reproducible workflows.
In my spare time, you will probably find me at a chessboard, playing Scrabble, or at the piano.

title: Map Gallery
text:
This gallery showcases cartographic layouts and spatial visualizations developed during my studies in geomatics and GIS.



Harmonized Land-Cover Maps
Comparison of harmonized land-cover datasets used to analyze agricultural transitions in the Lower Fraser Valley.


Change Detection Map
Spatial representation of land-cover change across the study area.


Agricultural Adjacency Analysis
Visualization of adjacency and interspersion patterns between agricultural classes.





Normalized Dataset Weights
Visualization of dataset weighting used during land-cover harmonization.


Land-Cover Transition Sankey
Diagram illustrating transitions between land-cover classes from 2015 to 2020.


Forest–Agriculture Spatial Patterns
Map showing spatial relationships between forest cover and agricultural land uses.
